color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
ode45 inserisce punto
esatto in τ=1 o τ=2
(solver NON si ferma)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Costanti e parametri veicolo
mu, RE, rho0, p0, Hscale, omegaE
mdry1, mp1, Tvac1, tb1, cvac1, Aex1
mdry2, mp2, CD, Sref, mfair, mpay
t_end1=5 s, t_end2=15 s

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Sito di lancio — KSC
lat0 = 28.57°, lon0 = -80.65°

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Scale di riferimento
L_ref = RE = 6 378 137 m
V_ref = 7800 m/s
T_ref = L_ref / V_ref ≈ 817.7 s
m_ref = m0 (massa iniziale totale)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Adimensionalizzazione parametri
mu* = mu / (V_ref²·L_ref)
ωE* = ωE · T_ref
ρ0* = ρ0 · L_ref³ / m_ref
p0* = p0 · L_ref³ / (m_ref·V_ref²)
H* = H_scale / L_ref
Tvac* = Tvac · L_ref / (m_ref·V_ref²)
Aex* = Aex / L_ref²
Q̇* = Q̇ · T_ref / m_ref
Sref* = Sref / L_ref²

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Condizioni iniziali nd
r0*=1, θ0=lon0, φ0=lat0
u0*=0, v0*=ωE·RE·cos(lat0)/V_ref
w0*=0, m0*=1
y0* = [r0*; θ0; φ0; u0*; v0*; w0*; m0*]

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Durate archi (nd)
t1* = t_end1 / T_ref
t2* = t_end2 / T_ref
tb* = tb1 / T_ref
Δ1 = t1*
Δ2 = t2* - t1*
Δ3 = tb* - t2*

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Struttura par
(tutti i parametri nd + T_ref, t_end1)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Arco 1 (ascesa verticale)
Δ = Δ1, t_arc_start* = 0
τ_k = τ, fase = 1

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Arco 2 (pitchover)
Δ = Δ2, t_arc_start* = t1*
τ_k = τ−1, fase = 2

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Arco 3 (gravity turn)
Δ = Δ3, t_arc_start* = t2*
τ_k = τ−2, fase = 3

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Spacchetta y*
r*, θ, φ, u*, v*, w*, m*

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Atmosfera nd
alt* = r* − 1
ρ* = ρ0* · exp(−alt*/H*)
p* = p0* · exp(−alt*/H*)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Velocità relativa nd
v_atm* = ωE* · r* · cos φ
ur*=u*, vr*=v*−v_atm*, wr*=w*
Vrel* = ‖ur*,vr*,wr*‖

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Drag nd
Dc* = −0.5 · ρ* · Sref* · CD · Vrel*
Du* = Dc*·ur*
Dv* = Dc*·vr*
Dw* = Dc*·wr*

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Spinta nd
Tmag* = Tvac* − p* · Aex*

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Ascesa verticale
Tu* = Tmag*
Tv* = 0
Tw* = 0

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Pitchover
t_dim = t* · T_ref
γT = 90° − 0.05·(t_dim−t_end1)
Tu* = Tmag*·sin(γT)
Tv* = Tmag*·cos(γT)
Tw* = 0 (ψ=90°, Est)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Gravity turn
Tu* = Tmag*·ur*/Vrel*
Tv* = Tmag*·vr*/Vrel*
Tw* = Tmag*·wr*/Vrel*

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Cinematica nd
ṙ* = u*
θ̇ = v* / (r*·cos φ)
φ̇ = w* / r*

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Dinamica nd
u̇* = (v²+w²)/r* + g_u* + (Tu*+Du*)/m*
v̇* = (−uv+vw·tan φ)/r* + (Tv*+Dv*)/m*
ẇ* = (−uw−v²·tan φ)/r + (Tw*+Dw*)/m*

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Scala per regola della catena
dydt = Δ · [ṙ*; θ̇; φ̇; u̇*; v̇*; ẇ*; ṁ*]

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Recupero t* da τ_sol
mask1: τ≤1 → t*= τ·Δ1
mask2: 1<τ≤2 → t*=(τ−1)·Δ2 + t1*
mask3: τ>2 → t*=(τ−2)·Δ3 + t2*
t = t* · T_ref

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Riconversione dimensionale
r = r*·L_ref, u,v,w = u*,v*,w*·V_ref
m = m*·m_ref

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Grandezze derivate
h = r − RE
Vmag = ‖u,v,w‖
Vrel = ‖ur,vr,wr‖ (atmosfera co-rotante)
ρ_traj, p_traj (esponenziale)
q_dyn = ½ρVrel²
Mach = Vrel / a_sound

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Loop k = 1 … N
calcolo angoli γT e γA

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Individua eventi di missione
ip1 = argmin|t − t_end1|
ip2 = argmin|t − t_end2|
im1 = primo k con Mach(k) ≥ 1
imQ = argmax(q_dyn)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Conversione ECI → ENU
East_km, North_km, Up_km
lon_ground, lat_ground

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Output console
masse, quota finale, velocità, Mach

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Figure 1-8 (unità dimensionali)
3D traj · quota · velocità · massa
pressione dinamica · Mach · angoli · traccia a terra

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Figura 9 (variabili nd vs τ)
r*, uvw*, m*, h*, |V*|, t_dim(τ)
boundary archi a τ=1 e τ=2

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: normal; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
